Why didn’t you find someone else?

questions.q: Phil: Some guy from the travel agency told me this morning that I just won two first-class seats on a round-trip flight to Switzerland, plus a 5000-dollar Swiss watch! Can you believe that? Kit: Well, my father often says, “If you think something is too good to be true, usually it’s not true!” Phil: I think I’d better make sure that it’s really happening!
options: I bet you always take his word for it!
I don’t think of him that way!
I suppose you know what he means!
I couldn’t agree with him more!
questions.explanation: 阿飛:有個旅行社的人今早打電話給我,說我剛剛贏 這四名傑出四胞胎兄弟的故事很快就在全國成為大 得兩張去瑞士的頭等來回機票,外加一只價值 5000 新聞。 CBS 新聞下了這樣的標題: 「站一邊去,漫威-全 美金的瑞士手錶!你能相信嗎? 新版本的『驚奇四超人』進城來了!」,顯示出這四胞胎 阿基:嗯,我父親常說: 「如果你認為某件事棒到似 有多棒。蘇珊娜‧戴薇絲,勒克達東部高中的校長,告 乎不會是真的,通常就不是真的!」 訴媒體這四胞胎兄弟真是出色!此外,他們在學校十分 阿飛: 我想我最好確定一下是否真 親近,但同時也都保有各自的人格特質,這一點讓他們 有其事。 成為眾人注目的焦點。至於他們的父母,則在一場訪談 (A) 我打賭你總是相信他所說的! 中說他們十分感謝來自社區與學校給他們四兄弟的支 (B) 我不認為他是那樣! 持。同時,在他們的家族中也有不少很棒的模範角色供 (C) 我猜你知道他的意思! 他們學習。這些都促成了他們的成功。 (D) 我非常同意他所說的! 面對這些頂尖的大學向他們開出入學條件,衛德家

options: What? Can you bring the price down a bit?
When can I get the discount?

questions.q: (In the hotel lobby) Jan: I wonder if you have a double suite for my folks and me. The Receptionist: Let me check... Oh yes! We do have one available now! Jan: The Receptionist: Certainly! But it will cost you 20 dollars more for one night.
options: Do you take credit cards or cash?

Can I have a free map of the city? III. 綜合測驗 ( 第 22-31 題,每題 2 分,共 20 分 ) 說明:以下兩篇短文,共有 10 個空格,為第 22 至 31 題,每題有四個選項,請依各篇短文文意, 選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 ▲ 下篇短文共有 5 個空格,為第 22 至 26 題,請依短文文意,選出一個最適合該空格的答案。 When a woman delivers quadruplets, she gives birth to four babies at the same time. Doubtless, it is an extraordinary biological phenomenon. However, it is even more extraordinary when each of the quadruplets turns out to be highly successful! Nick, Nigel, Zach, and Aaron Wade are quadruplet brothers from Liberty Township, Ohio. 22 from Lakota East High School this year, all four of them were waiting for the results of their college applications. Amazingly, they were all accepted by several top universities in the U.S., 23 Yale, Harvard, Princeton, and the other Ivy League universities. The story of the outstanding quadruplets soon became big news nationwide. CBS news gave such a headline, “Move over, Marvel - there’s a new “Fantastic Four” in town!” to show how remarkable the quadruplets were. Suzanna Davis, the principal of Lakota East, told the press that they were absolutely brilliant! Moreover, they had been so close at school but also had their own individual personalities 24 made them the focus of everyone’s attention. As for their parents, they stated in an interview that they were grateful for all the support their community and schools had offered their four boys. 25, there were also numerous wonderful role models in their family. All these contributed to their success. With the offers from all these top-notch universities, the Wade quadruplets knew that they had to be 26 about making their final decisions. On May 1, 2017, they told NBC news that they had all decided to go to Yale, for Yale offered them the most generous scholarships!
questions.explanation: ( 在飯店大廳 ) 多人知道,如果沒有喬瑟夫‧貝爾醫生,就不會有今天 小珍:請問有沒有雙人房給我的父母和我? 的福爾摩斯故事。 接待人員:讓我查查看...有的!我們現在的確有一間 喬瑟夫‧貝爾醫生 (1837-1911) 是愛丁堡大學醫學院 空的雙人房! 的教授。除了行醫外,他也花了許多時間發展他的觀察 小珍: 技巧,因為他相信這種技巧在他這一行裡終究會派上用 接待人員:當然可以!不過一個晚上我們要多收 20 場。而他在愛丁堡大學執教多年的期間,曾有許多次他 美金。 讓他的學生對於他敏銳的觀察,留下深刻的印象。舉例 (A) 你們收信用卡還是現金? 來說,有一次一位病人走進他的辦公室。為了替他做個 (B) 你們要先看身分證件嗎? 完美的診斷,貝爾醫生仔細端詳他。最後,他精準推斷 (C) 能否替我在房間加床? 出這名病人是個士兵! ( 事實上,他連他所服役的兵團都 (D) 能否給我一份免費的本市地圖? 正確無誤地推斷出來! ) 你也許已經猜到,亞瑟‧柯南‧道爾正是貝爾醫生 III. 綜合測驗 的學生之一。事實上,第一本福爾摩斯的小說, 「血字的 Question 22-26 研究」,出版於 1887 年。當時便有許多讀者注意到夏洛 若一位女士產下四胞胎,就表示她同時生下四名寶 克‧福爾摩斯與貝爾醫生間的相似之處,而推想出貝爾 寶。毫無疑問,這是個特殊的生物現象。然而,倘若四 醫生應是夏洛克‧福爾摩斯的原型。因此,貝爾醫生便 胞胎中的每一位最後都成為極為成功的人士,則就更為 成為當時的名人。結果他每天除了行醫與教學外,還得 特殊! 應付大眾的關注。他曾告訴他的朋友,正是因為夏洛克‧ 尼克、奈吉、查克與亞倫四人是衛德家的四胞胎, 福爾摩斯,他才不時地感到心煩與被人打擾。 106-1 共同科目 英文 詳解

options: a character created by the screenwriter of Catch Me If You Can

an expert on how to lower personal information risks effectively

questions.q: Which of the following IS Abagnale’s suggestion in his speech?
options: One’s birth date or birthplace shouldn’t be made public on Facebook.
Always use exactly the same password on every website you visit.
Every government office must have a paper shredder ready at any time.
Children’s pictures are very necessary on today’s social media.
questions.explanation: 下列何者是阿巴涅先生演講中的建議? 這裡我們似乎可以下這個結論:美的概念隨著時間 (A) 個人的出生日期與出生地不該在臉書上公開。 而改變,也創造出不同的趨勢與潮流。有時候我們真的 (B) 在每個拜訪的網站上持續用相同的密碼。 得問自己: 「真有必要如此盲目地追隨這些趨勢與潮流? 106-1 共同科目 英文 詳解 我們難道不能做自己?做自己不就是唯一真正的美?」 (1) 空白 ( 未書寫文字 ) 。 或者另一個更重要的問題是: 「只為了讓自己在旁人眼中 (2) 文字零碎、形同未答。 0 看起來美麗,就放棄一切,甚至包括自己辛苦掙來的錢, (3) 只抄題目或其他試題。 以及寶貴的健康,這樣做是否真的值得?」 (4) 內容完全錯誤。

questions.subject: 英文
questions.unit: 106-1-四技二專-00共同科目 英文
questions.q: According to the essay, which of the following is WRONG?
options: It’s getting less and less difficult to commit an identity theft because of our carelessness with our private information on the Internet.
Cyber-thieves particularly love stealing young children’s identities because they are the ones whose personal information is least protected.
Whenever we are done using a document that has our personal information on it, we must be used to cutting it to pieces with a paper shredder.
All in all, Abagnale told us in his speech that the only way to beat identity thieves is to be extremely careful in handling our private information.
questions.explanation: 正解：(B)；來源：106-1-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

it is based on a long-term and careful observation ▲ 閱讀下文後,作答第 37-41 題 We all know that beauty is a subjective concept, as the proverb goes, “Beauty is in the eye of the beholder.” Namely, someone who is beautiful for one could be quite the opposite for another. Therefore, there is no established yardstick for beauty because everyone is entitled to his or her own opinions about it. On the other hand, the concept of beauty doesn’t just vary from person to person. It may vary from culture to culture, or even from generation to generation.
questions.explanation: 正解：(B)；來源：106-1-四技二專-00共同科目 英文解析.pdf

Everyone can choose to believe in the traditional concept of beauty.
Different cultures may have their own proverbs to describe beauty.
Everyone must be trained to learn how to appreciate beauty correctly.

Accepting the various concepts of beauty is worthwhile. 第二部分:非選擇題 ( 第 I 至 III 題,每題 6 分,共 18 分 ) I. 填充 說明: ▲請依據中文提示,將試題內空格○ 1 、○ 2 答案之完整單字 ( 含提示之字首 ),分別作答於答 案卷之作答欄○ 1 、○ 2 之指定範圍內以完成句子。 ▲請勿抄題,否則不予計分。請注意: 每格不限只填一字 。

(C) 做自己是唯一讓自己看起來真正美麗的方法。 或是 Ron could / can afford the expensive machine, but (D) 接受各種美的概念是值得的。 his father didn’t / doesn’t want him to buy it. 第二部分:非選擇題 評閱指標 I. 填充 級分 說明
